# growthbook_fact_table (Resource)

A GrowthBook fact table. Fact tables define a SQL query against a data source that fact metrics and filters are built on top of.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "growthbook_fact_table" "orders" {
  name          = "Orders"
  description   = "One row per completed order"
  datasource    = "ds_warehouse"
  user_id_types = ["user_id"]
  sql           = "SELECT user_id, timestamp, amount, country FROM orders"
  projects      = [growthbook_project.web.id]

  columns = [
    {
      column   = "amount"
      datatype = "number"
      name     = "Order amount"
    },
    {
      column   = "country"
      datatype = "string"
    },
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `datasource` (String) Data source ID this fact table queries. Changing this forces a new fact table.
- `name` (String) Human-readable fact table name.
- `sql` (String) SQL query that defines the fact table.
- `user_id_types` (List of String) Identifier columns available in the query (e.g. `id`, `anonymous_id`).

### Optional

- `archived` (Boolean) Whether the fact table is archived.
- `columns` (Attributes List) Column metadata overrides. Columns are derived by GrowthBook from parsing the SQL; use this to set metadata (datatype, display name, etc.) on derived columns. Write-only: the column set is not refreshed from the server, so only the columns you declare are tracked. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--columns))
- `description` (String) Description of the fact table.
- `event_name` (String) Event name used in SQL template variables.
- `managed_by` (String) Where the fact table is managed from: empty, `api`, or `admin`. Set to `api` to disable editing in the GrowthBook UI.
- `owner` (String) Owner userId or email address.
- `projects` (List of String) Associated project IDs.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags associated with the fact table.

### Read-Only

- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp (RFC3339).
- `id` (String) Unique fact table identifier.

<a id="nestedatt--columns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `columns`

Required:

- `column` (String) Actual column name in the SQL query.

Optional:

- `always_inline_filter` (Boolean) Always include this column as an inline filter in queries.
- `auto_slices` (List of String) Specific slices to automatically analyze for this column.
- `datatype` (String) Column data type: `number`, `string`, `date`, `boolean`, `json`, `binary`, `other`, or empty.
- `deleted` (Boolean) Whether the column has been deleted from the source.
- `description` (String) Column description.
- `is_auto_slice_column` (Boolean) Whether this column can be used for auto slice analysis (enterprise).
- `locked_auto_slices` (List of String) Slices protected from automatic updates.
- `name` (String) Display name for the column.
- `number_format` (String) Number format hint: empty, `currency`, `time:seconds`, `memory:bytes`, or `memory:kilobytes`.
